heading: Exemption from laws prohibiting interest of Members of Congress in contracts
label: 1386 Exemption from laws prohibiting interest of Members of Congress in contracts
text: The provisions of and sections 431 and 432 of title 18 shall not be applicable to loans or payments made under this chapter (except under ).section 6306 of title 41section 1383(a) of this title
